prs.author: Jason

prs.title: Ch/sm 206 bts prompt
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 536 lines across 6 files adding BTS prompt logic, new AI data field collectors, a slide component, and an API route — a solid medium feature with Chris driving the core generation logic.

prs.title: Remove unused dependencies from package.json
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Purely vendored/auto-generated changes with zero custom lines — trivial dependency cleanup.

prs.title: introduces competitive analysis agent

prs.rationale: 536 lines across 6 files — same scope as PR #163, a staging merge of the BTS prompt feature with Chris authoring the core generation and Jason contributing fixups and route refinements.

prs.title: License-based navigation, Gantt timeline views, type safety improvements, and migration consolidation
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 3419 lines across 49 files spanning license-based navigation, Gantt timeline views, trial flow, schema changes, AI agent updates, type safety refactors, and migration consolidation — a transformative multi-system epic.

prs.title: Add dot visualization for single-date items in Gantt views
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 96 lines across three Gantt view components adding dot visualization for single-date items — a small, focused UI enhancement.

prs.title: License-based navigation, Gantt timeline views, type safety improvements, and migration consolidation
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 3337 lines across 47 files covering license-based navigation, Gantt views, trial actions, schema updates, AI agent changes, and substantial documentation — a large-scale multi-domain epic authored by a single contributor.

prs.title: Tackle.io Integration, Gap Analysis Refactor, AWS Marketplace Fix, UI/UX Improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 2439 lines across 54 files refactoring gap analysis, adding Tackle.io integration, fixing AWS Marketplace, and improving UI/UX across many subsystems — a major feature with wide architectural reach.

prs.title: Tackle.io Integration - CSV Upload & Dynamic Slide Deck
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 2663 lines across 58 files introducing Tackle.io CSV upload, dynamic slide deck generation, gap analysis refactor, and marketplace fixes — a large feature touching AI, UI, and integration layers.

prs.title: Fix AWS Marketplace registration: Add GetEntitlements API call
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 224 custom lines adding a GetEntitlements API call to fix AWS Marketplace registration, with supporting documentation — a small-medium targeted bug fix with non-trivial API integration work.

prs.title: Add Goals support to snapshot system
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 930 lines across 11 files adding Goals and junction table support to the snapshot system, refactoring row components, fixing AI agent role validation, and updating docs — a significant feature with Jason driving the architecture.

prs.title: Add Goals support to snapshot system
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 926 lines across 10 files introducing Goals support to the snapshot system including AI agent tools, actions, row components, and utility logic — a meaningful platform feature by a single author.

prs.title: Production Release: Goals System & AWS Marketplace Integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A production release merging 12,810 custom lines across 112 files encompassing a full Goals System, AWS Marketplace integration, multiple new AI sub-agents (field-completion, gaps, strategy-deck), and significant architectural additions to the chat agent — this is clearly a multi-week transformative effort.

prs.title: Goals, Gaps & Tasks System - Complete Agent Integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 9,457 custom lines across 86 files delivering a complete Goals/Gaps/Tasks system with full agent integration, new gaps-agent sub-agent, AWS partner finder profile, and an extensive better-together story AI pipeline — representing the core feature spine of a major multi-week development effort.

stories.name: Goals System & Snapshot Integration
stories.rationale: Added Goals support to the snapshot system, enabling the platform to capture and track goal state over time.

stories.name: Goals, Gaps & Tasks Agent Intelligence
stories.rationale: Delivered a full production release integrating Goals, Gaps, and Tasks into the AI agent system alongside AWS Marketplace support.

stories.name: Tackle.io Integration & AWS Marketplace Enhancements
stories.rationale: Built end-to-end Tackle.io integration with CSV upload, dynamic slide decks, and fixed AWS Marketplace entitlement registration.

stories.name: License-Based Navigation & Gantt Timeline Views
stories.rationale: Introduced license-gated navigation, Gantt timeline views with single-date dot visualization, type safety improvements, and migration consolidation.

stories.name: Competitive Analysis AI Agent
stories.rationale: Launched a new competitive analysis agent alongside BTS prompt improvements and staged releases to surface market intelligence automatically.

stories.name: Infrastructure Hardening & Dependency Cleanup
stories.rationale: Improved platform resilience by gracefully handling missing S3 credentials and removing unused dependencies to reduce build bloat.
